title: juniperus × media var. globosa
intro: Juniperus × media var. globosa, also known as Globe Juniper, is a compact, evergreen shrub that is a cultivar of the Juniperus media plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The Globe Juniper has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, arthritis, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Globe Juniper include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to create tonics, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
